description: Canonical catalogue of clinical values used across all guidelines. Each value has a stable snake_case id, type information, extraction hints (for pulling from notes), and a prompt (for asking the user if extraction fails). Per-guideline JSONs reference these ids; cross-guideline consistency by construction.

gestational_age_weeks.label: Gestational age
gestational_age_weeks.description: Current gestational age expressed in decimal weeks. 32+4 weeks = 32.6.
gestational_age_weeks.extractionHint: Look for patterns like 'X+Y weeks', 'X+Y/40', 'X+Y wks', 'X+Y/52', or just 'X weeks gestation'. Convert X+Y to X + Y/7.
gestational_age_weeks.prompt: What is the patient's gestational age (weeks)?

parity.label: Parity
parity.description: Obstetric parity expressed in the standard GxPy format.
parity.prompt: What is the patient's parity (e.g. G2P1)?

rfm_present.label: Reduced fetal movements present
rfm_present.description: Whether the patient is presenting with reduced fetal movements as the reason for assessment. The inverse concept ('fetal movements normal/perceived') maps to the same boolean (negated).
rfm_present.extractionHint: Look for 'RFM', 'reduced fetal movements', 'reduced movements', 'decreased movements', or any presenting-complaint language describing movement reduction. Negative: 'movements normal', 'movements as usual'.
rfm_present.prompt: Is the patient presenting with reduced fetal movements?

rfm_duration_hours.label: Duration of reduced movements
rfm_duration_hours.description: How long the reduction in fetal movements has been present, in hours.
rfm_duration_hours.extractionHint: Look for 'for X hours', 'since X (timestamp)', 'overnight', 'since yesterday' — convert to hours.
rfm_duration_hours.prompt: How long has the reduction in movements been present (hours)?

absent_movements_periods.label: Any periods of absent movements?
absent_movements_periods.description: Whether the patient has experienced any periods of complete absence of fetal movements during this episode.
absent_movements_periods.extractionHint: Look for 'no movements felt', 'absent movements', 'no movements since X' (positive) vs 'felt some movements', 'occasional movements' (negative).
absent_movements_periods.prompt: Has the patient had any periods of complete absence of fetal movements?
aliases: presence or absence of periods of absent fetal movements

first_or_recurrent_rfm_episode.label: First or recurrent RFM episode?
first_or_recurrent_rfm_episode.description: Whether this is the patient's first RFM presentation in this pregnancy or a recurrent episode.
first_or_recurrent_rfm_episode.extractionHint: Look for 'first episode', 'no prior episodes', 'first RFM' (first); 'second episode', 'previous RFM', 'recurrent', 'X weeks ago presented with RFM' (recurrent).
first_or_recurrent_rfm_episode.prompt: Is this the first RFM episode in this pregnancy, or recurrent?
aliases: episode count of reduced fetal movement

fetal_heart_auscultated.label: Fetal heart auscultated successfully
fetal_heart_auscultated.description: Whether the fetal heart has been successfully auscultated by handheld Doppler, CTG, or USS during this assessment.
fetal_heart_auscultated.extractionHint: Positive: 'FH heard', 'FH confirmed', 'fetal heart auscultated', 'Doppler — FH 140s'. Negative: 'FH not heard', 'unable to auscultate FH', 'no FH on Doppler'.
fetal_heart_auscultated.prompt: Was the fetal heart successfully auscultated?

ctg_performed.label: CTG performed
ctg_performed.description: Whether a cardiotocograph (CTG) has been performed.
ctg_performed.extractionHint: Positive: 'CTG performed', 'CTG commenced', 'CTG reactive'. Negative: silence or 'CTG not done'.

ctg_result.label: CTG result
ctg_result.description: Outcome of the CTG. Normal/reactive = baseline 110-160, normal variability, no decels. Non-reassuring = any concerning feature. Abnormal = pathological tracing.

uss_performed_this_episode.label: USS performed at this episode
uss_performed_this_episode.description: Whether an ultrasound scan was performed as part of this RFM assessment (not just arranged for later).
uss_performed_this_episode.extractionHint: Positive: 'USS performed', 'biometry done today'. Negative: 'USS booked for tomorrow', 'scan arranged'.
uss_performed_this_episode.prompt: Was an ultrasound performed at this assessment (not just arranged)?

uss_arranged_earliest_opportunity.label: USS arranged at earliest opportunity
uss_arranged_earliest_opportunity.description: Whether an ultrasound scan has been booked or arranged at the earliest available opportunity (when not already performed).
uss_arranged_earliest_opportunity.extractionHint: Positive: 'USS booked for tomorrow', 'scan arranged at earliest slot', 'growth scan booked'.
uss_arranged_earliest_opportunity.prompt: Has a USS been booked at the earliest available opportunity?

uss_in_preceding_2_weeks.label: USS in preceding 2 weeks
uss_in_preceding_2_weeks.description: Whether the patient has had an ultrasound scan in the preceding 2 weeks.
uss_in_preceding_2_weeks.extractionHint: Positive: 'USS 1 week ago', 'recent scan within 2 weeks'. Negative: 'last scan at X weeks' if difference > 2 weeks; 'no scan since booking'.
uss_in_preceding_2_weeks.prompt: Has the patient had a USS in the preceding 2 weeks?

uss_biometry_documented.label: USS biometry / EFW result documented
uss_biometry_documented.description: Whether USS biometry (HC, AC, FL) and estimated fetal weight (EFW) have been documented and their outcome. EFW is a derived calculation from biometry, so this single value captures both the raw biometry measurements and the derived EFW.
uss_biometry_documented.extractionHint: Look for biometry measurements with centiles, e.g. 'EFW 30th centile', 'AC 25th centile', 'biometry on Y centile', 'estimated fetal weight X grams'.
uss_biometry_documented.prompt: USS biometry / EFW: normal, abnormal, or not done?

uss_liquor_volume_documented.label: Liquor volume result
uss_liquor_volume_documented.extractionHint: Look for AFI value (e.g. 'AFI 12cm'), DVP value, 'liquor normal', 'oligohydramnios'.

uss_umbilical_artery_doppler_documented.label: Umbilical artery Doppler result
uss_umbilical_artery_doppler_documented.extractionHint: Look for 'UA Doppler normal', 'PI X', 'RI X', or 'abnormal Doppler'.

uss_fetal_morphology_documented.label: Fetal morphology assessment documented
uss_fetal_morphology_documented.description: Whether a fetal morphology survey is documented (this episode or previously).
uss_fetal_morphology_documented.extractionHint: 'Anomaly scan normal', 'morphology survey done', 'no anomalies seen'.

maternal_blood_pressure_measured.label: Maternal blood pressure measured
maternal_blood_pressure_measured.description: Whether the patient's BP has been measured at this assessment.
maternal_blood_pressure_measured.extractionHint: Look for 'BP X/Y', specific mmHg values.

urinalysis_performed.label: Urinalysis performed
urinalysis_performed.description: Whether urinalysis (urine dip for protein) has been performed.
urinalysis_performed.extractionHint: 'Urinalysis NAD', 'urine dip nil', 'trace protein on dip', 'PCR sent'.

symphysis_fundal_height_measured.label: Symphysis-fundal height measured
symphysis_fundal_height_measured.description: Whether SFH has been measured and plotted.
symphysis_fundal_height_measured.extractionHint: 'SFH X cm', 'fundal height measured', 'plotted on customised chart'.

on_serial_growth_scans.label: Patient on serial growth scans
on_serial_growth_scans.description: Whether the patient is currently undergoing serial growth scan surveillance (e.g. for FGR risk).
on_serial_growth_scans.extractionHint: 'On serial USS', 'fortnightly growth scans', 'on USS surveillance'.
on_serial_growth_scans.prompt: Is the patient on serial growth scans?

bmi.label: Booking BMI
bmi.description: The patient's BMI at booking (or current BMI if booking value not available).

smoking_status.label: Smoking status
smoking_status.prompt: What is the patient's smoking status?

diabetes_status.label: Diabetes status
diabetes_status.description: Diabetes status — none, gestational, or pre-existing.

hypertension_status.label: Hypertension status
hypertension_status.description: Hypertension status — none, chronic, gestational, or pre-eclampsia.

maternal_age_years.label: Maternal age
maternal_age_years.extractionHint: Look for 'X yr', 'X-year-old', or compute from DOB if note shows current date.
maternal_age_years.prompt: What is the patient's age in years?

previous_sga_baby.label: Previous SGA baby
previous_sga_baby.description: Whether the patient has had a previous small-for-gestational-age baby.

previous_stillbirth.label: Previous stillbirth
previous_stillbirth.description: Whether the patient has a history of stillbirth.

placental_issues_history.label: Placental issues history
placental_issues_history.description: Whether the patient has any history of placental issues (e.g. previous abruption, placenta praevia).

multiple_pregnancy.label: Multiple pregnancy
multiple_pregnancy.description: Whether this is a multiple (twin/triplet) pregnancy.

encounter_type.label: Encounter type
encounter_type.description: The clinical context of this encounter.
encounter_type.extractionHint: 'Booking visit' (booking); 'attended triage with RFM' (acute_rfm); 'antenatal clinic for growth review' (growth_review); 'routine appointment' (routine_antenatal).
encounter_type.prompt: What type of encounter is this?

disposition_at_end_of_encounter.label: Disposition at end of encounter
disposition_at_end_of_encounter.description: What happened to the patient at the end of the encounter.

fm_advice_documented.label: Fetal movement awareness advice documented
fm_advice_documented.description: Whether the note documents any fetal-movement awareness advice given to the woman during the encounter.
fm_advice_documented.extractionHint: Any explicit reference to advising about fetal movements: 'counselled re FMs', 'safety net re movements', 'advised to report any change'.

fm_advice_uses_subjective_framing.label: FM advice uses subjective framing
fm_advice_uses_subjective_framing.description: When FM advice is given, whether it uses the woman's subjective perception of change/decrease (as opposed to formal counting with specified numbers).
fm_advice_uses_subjective_framing.extractionHint: Positive (subjective): 'report any change in usual pattern', 'be aware of decrease'. Negative (formal counting): 'count 10 movements/day', 'kick chart issued'.
fm_advice_uses_subjective_framing.prompt: Is the FM advice framed around subjective perception (not formal counting)?

fm_advice_uses_formal_counting.label: FM advice uses formal counting
fm_advice_uses_formal_counting.description: Whether the FM advice recommends formal counting using specified numbers (e.g. count-to-10, kick chart).
fm_advice_uses_formal_counting.extractionHint: Positive: 'kick chart', 'count to 10', 'X movements per day'. Negative if advice is subjective only.
fm_advice_uses_formal_counting.prompt: Does the FM advice recommend formal counting (count-to-10, kick chart, etc.)?

iol_or_birth_expedited.label: Birth expedited (IOL, CS)
iol_or_birth_expedited.description: Whether the plan includes expediting birth (induction of labour or caesarean) on the basis of this RFM episode.
iol_or_birth_expedited.extractionHint: 'IOL booked', 'plan for induction', 'elective LSCS planned', 'expedited delivery'.

reassurance_documented.label: Reassurance documented
reassurance_documented.description: Whether explicit reassurance to the patient is documented in the note.

no_expedite_decision_documented.label: No-expedite decision documented
no_expedite_decision_documented.description: Whether the note explicitly documents that there is no indication to expedite birth.
no_expedite_decision_documented.extractionHint: 'No indication to expedite', 'no grounds for early delivery', 'continue with planned date'.
no_expedite_decision_documented.prompt: Is the 'no expedite' conclusion explicitly documented?

handheld_doppler_attempted.label: Handheld Doppler auscultation attempted
handheld_doppler_attempted.description: Whether the note documents that handheld Doppler auscultation of the fetal heart was attempted (regardless of outcome).
handheld_doppler_attempted.extractionHint: 'Doppler attempted', 'tried Doppler', 'attempted to auscultate FH with Doppler', or any phrasing indicating the clinician used a handheld Doppler.

previous_rfm_investigations_normal.label: Previous RFM investigations were normal
previous_rfm_investigations_normal.description: Whether the patient has had previous RFM episodes investigated and the investigations were documented as normal.
previous_rfm_investigations_normal.extractionHint: 'Previous RFM, CTG normal', 'last episode 2 weeks ago, all normal'.
previous_rfm_investigations_normal.prompt: Were any previous RFM investigations documented as normal?

clinical_suspicion_of_fgr.label: Clinical suspicion of FGR
clinical_suspicion_of_fgr.description: Whether the clinician has documented a clinical suspicion of fetal growth restriction at this encounter (separate from documented risk factors).
clinical_suspicion_of_fgr.extractionHint: 'Concern re growth', 'suspect FGR', 'SFH below dates', 'clinical concern about growth'.
clinical_suspicion_of_fgr.prompt: Is there clinical suspicion of FGR at this encounter?

stillbirth_risk_history_taken.label: Detailed stillbirth-risk history taken
stillbirth_risk_history_taken.description: Whether a detailed stillbirth-risk history has been documented (as a process step), distinct from the presence/absence of individual risk factors.
stillbirth_risk_history_taken.extractionHint: 'Stillbirth risk history taken', 'risk factors reviewed', 'detailed PMH for stillbirth risk'.
stillbirth_risk_history_taken.prompt: Has a detailed stillbirth-risk history been taken?

safety_netting_advice_documented.label: Safety-netting advice documented
safety_netting_advice_documented.description: Whether explicit safety-netting advice (about what to do if symptoms recur or worsen) is documented in the note.
safety_netting_advice_documented.extractionHint: 'Safety net advice given', 'advised to return if X', 'told to re-attend if Y'.

advice_lie_on_left_side.label: Advised to lie on left side
advice_lie_on_left_side.description: Whether the woman has been advised to lie on her left side as part of a focused fetal-movement assessment.
advice_lie_on_left_side.extractionHint: 'Lie on left side', 'left lateral position', 'left side for 2 hours'.
advice_lie_on_left_side.prompt: Was the woman advised to lie on her left side?

advice_focus_on_fetal_movements_for_2_ho.label: Advised to focus on movements for 2 hours
advice_focus_on_fetal_movements_for_2_ho.description: Whether the woman has been advised to focus on fetal movements for 2 hours as a focused assessment.
advice_focus_on_fetal_movements_for_2_ho.extractionHint: 'Focus on movements for 2 hours', '2-hour focused assessment', 'concentrate on movements'.
advice_focus_on_fetal_movements_for_2_ho.prompt: Was the woman advised to focus on movements for 2 hours?

advice_contact_if_fewer_than_10_movement.label: Advised to contact unit if fewer than 10 movements in 2 hours
advice_contact_if_fewer_than_10_movement.description: Whether the woman has been advised to contact the maternity unit immediately if she feels fewer than 10 discrete fetal movements during a 2-hour focused assessment. This is element (c) of PP #15's three-part advice.
advice_contact_if_fewer_than_10_movement.extractionHint: 'Contact if <10 movements', 'if fewer than 10 movements in 2 hours, contact unit', 'call if less than 10'.
advice_contact_if_fewer_than_10_movement.prompt: Was the woman advised to contact if fewer than 10 movements in 2 hours?

information_provided_no_increased_risk_a.label: Counselling at >=39wk: no increased risk from expediting
information_provided_no_increased_risk_a.description: Whether the clinician has documented counselling that after 39+0 weeks, expediting birth does not increase maternal or neonatal risk.
information_provided_no_increased_risk_a.extractionHint: 'Counselled that IOL at >=39 wks does not increase risk', 'discussed that expediting at term is safe'.

referral_fetal_medicine_specialist_discu.label: Fetal-medicine specialist referral discussed
referral_fetal_medicine_specialist_discu.description: Whether referral to (or discussion with) a fetal-medicine specialist is documented.
referral_fetal_medicine_specialist_discu.extractionHint: 'Discussed with fetal medicine', 'referral to FMU', 'FM consultant input'.

risks_benefits_of_expediting_discussed.label: Risks and benefits of expediting birth discussed
risks_benefits_of_expediting_discussed.description: Whether the risks and benefits of expediting birth have been documented as discussed with the woman (shared decision-making).
risks_benefits_of_expediting_discussed.extractionHint: 'Risks and benefits of IOL discussed', 'shared decision re: expediting', 'patient given info on risks/benefits of induction'.
risks_benefits_of_expediting_discussed.prompt: Were risks/benefits of expediting birth documented as discussed?

discussion_with_senior_obstetrician_docu.label: Discussion with senior obstetrician documented
discussion_with_senior_obstetrician_docu.description: Whether the note documents discussion of the case with a senior obstetrician (registrar or consultant).
discussion_with_senior_obstetrician_docu.extractionHint: 'Discussed with reg', 'consultant review', 'escalated to senior obs', 'senior decision'.
discussion_with_senior_obstetrician_docu.prompt: Was discussion with a senior obstetrician documented?

womans_response_to_advice_documented.label: Woman's response to advice documented
womans_response_to_advice_documented.description: Whether the woman's response to the advice or management plan is documented (e.g. 'understood', 'agreed', 'questions answered').
womans_response_to_advice_documented.extractionHint: 'Patient understood', 'agreed with plan', 'no questions', 'happy with plan'.
womans_response_to_advice_documented.prompt: Is the woman's response to advice documented?

case_reviewed_for_predisposing_causes.label: Case reviewed for predisposing causes
case_reviewed_for_predisposing_causes.description: Whether the case has been documented as reviewed for predisposing maternal, placental, or fetal causes (relevant for recurrent RFM).
case_reviewed_for_predisposing_causes.extractionHint: 'Reviewed for predisposing factors', 'case discussion for causes', 'maternal/placental/fetal review'.
case_reviewed_for_predisposing_causes.prompt: Has the case been reviewed for predisposing causes?

biophysical_profile_performed.label: Biophysical profile performed
biophysical_profile_performed.description: Whether a fetal biophysical profile has been performed.
biophysical_profile_performed.prompt: Has a biophysical profile been performed?

ctg_type.label: Type of CTG performed
ctg_type.description: Whether the CTG performed was a computerised CTG (e.g. Dawes-Redman) or a conventional CTG.

fetal_movement_perception_status.label: Fetal movement perception status
fetal_movement_perception_status.description: The woman's reported perception of fetal movements at presentation: unsure (uncertain whether reduced), definite_reduction (clearly fewer than usual), normal (movements as expected), absent (no movements felt).
fetal_movement_perception_status.extractionHint: 'Not sure if reduced' (unsure); 'usually feels 10+/day, today 3-4' (definite_reduction); 'movements normal' (normal); 'no movements felt for X hours' (absent).
fetal_movement_perception_status.prompt: What is the woman's perception of movements?

first_movements_felt.label: First fetal movements felt
first_movements_felt.description: Whether the woman has reported feeling first fetal movements yet (relevant in early gestation / primiparous PPs).
first_movements_felt.extractionHint: 'Felt movements at X weeks', 'has not yet felt movements', 'feeling movements daily'.
first_movements_felt.prompt: Has the woman felt first fetal movements yet?

reduced_fetal_movements_persist.label: RFM persists after assessment
reduced_fetal_movements_persist.description: Whether the woman continues to perceive reduced fetal movements after initial assessment (e.g. after CTG monitoring). Distinct from rfm_present which is the initial presentation state.
reduced_fetal_movements_persist.extractionHint: 'Movements still reduced', 'persistent RFM despite normal CTG', 'no improvement during monitoring'.
reduced_fetal_movements_persist.prompt: Does the woman still perceive RFM after initial assessment?
